label: Nursing Grade 12 PH
description: Senior high nursing-care lesson for a Philippine health context, useful for testing technical vocabulary, patient-safety passages, and upper-grade explanatory tone.

curriculum.competency_description: Apply standard precautions to prevent infection during patient care.

sub_competencies.label: Identify situations that require standard precautions during patient care

instructional_design.core_concept: Standard precautions protect patients and healthcare workers by treating blood and body fluids as potentially infectious and using consistent infection-control actions.
instructional_design.essential_question_seed: How do nurses use standard precautions to protect themselves and their patients?
